name: ZENKER DIVERTICULUM
definition: PHARYNGOESOPHAGEAL DIVERTICULUM outpouching of posterior hypopharyngeal wall = pulsion diverticulum with herniation of

demographics.Associated with: hiatal hernia, gastroduodenal ulcer, midesophageal diverticulum, esophageal

dominant_finding: partial / complete obstruction of esophagus from external pressure of sac contents →
distribution: posterior + inferior barium extension in upper half of semilunar depression on posterior

barium-filled sac extending caudally behind + usually to left of esophagus
partial / complete obstruction of esophagus from external pressure of sac contents →
partial barium reflux from diverticulum into hypopharynx

general: posterior + inferior barium extension in upper half of semilunar depression on posterior
